final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 character expression grid illustration inspired by the 仙剑奇侠传 character 赵灵儿 IP.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation Pixar-style aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3×3 grid layout with 9 panels, each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 panels with 赵灵儿-inspired young woman (long flowing light-colored hair, delicate ethereal features, traditional fantasy aesthetic adapted to 3D Pixar style), one per panel:
  Top-left: expression — winking; action — adjusting glasses; outfit — green sweater
  Top-center: expression — smirking; action — lowering dark sunglasses; outfit — red leather jacket
  Top-right: expression — thinking; action — finger on chin; outfit — yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: expression — big smile; action — arms resting on edge; outfit — black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: expression — smiling; action — thumbs up; outfit — orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: expression — neutral; action — drinking boba tea; outfit — blue sweater
  Bottom-left: expression — happy; action — waving; outfit — purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: expression — laughing with eyes closed; action — arms crossed; outfit — pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: expression — silly; action — poking cheeks; outfit — teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper hole framing for each of the 9 panels
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, playful, expressive atmosphere — exact light setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction across panels — exact palette per panel is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished 3D render surface quality — exact sheen and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels in a clean 3×3 grid; each panel must show a distinct expression and action as listed; character must remain visually consistent as 赵灵儿 across all panels
Avoid: flat 2D illustration style; mixing up expressions or outfits across panels; losing the torn-paper-hole framing motif
